name: Snowballs for July
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: 1971 Bisquick Cook Book
Heat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Cream butter and sugar together until light and fluffy. Stir in the Bisquick baking mix, chopped nuts, and almond extract. Shape the dough into level teaspoonfuls of balls and place on an ungreased baking sheet. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown. Allow the snowballs to cool slightly before removing from the baking sheet. While still warm, roll each ball in confectioners' sugar. Yield: 6 dozen.
